bullet_points: Load the raw dataset and handle missing values ('.').
Identify and print column names for QHD, QGM, QKB, QGO, and QDF blocks.
Map binary, ordinal, and categorical variables; construct composite indices for Job Security and Nature of Work.
Print missingness summaries and distributions of QEA_2 and QEB_2 after encoding.
Save the cleaned, processed dataset and the verified column name lists to disk.
Perform LCA on the joint distribution of QEA_2 and QEB_2, treating "Not sure" as a distinct nominal category.
Evaluate class solutions (2 through 6) using BIC and entropy; save the BIC/entropy plot.
Print conditional response probabilities for the chosen class solution to characterize psychological trajectories.
Save class membership assignments and model statistics.
Conduct EFA on binary QHD items using a tetrachoric correlation matrix.
Extract "Positive Affect" and "Negative Affect" factors; save the factor loading heatmap.
Calculate and print McDonald’s omega for internal consistency.
Print correlations between the "Negative Affect" factor and each QF deterrent item to assess potential multicollinearity.
Use latent class membership (from Step 2) as the outcome for Elastic Net regression.
Run stratified models for job level and sector strata (n > 100); print sample sizes per stratum.
Save a coefficient plot showing top non-zero Elastic Net coefficients for the overall model and strata.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Granular Policy Identification via Elastic Net

bullet_points: Construct interaction terms between top-ranked QKB enablers and QF deterrents (QF_4, QF_7); print interaction coefficients and FDR-adjusted p-values.
Perform multinomial logistic regression with "Anxiously Declining" as the reference category.
Save a forest plot of odds ratios with 95% confidence intervals for the "Resiliently Optimistic" class.
Compute predicted probabilities of "Resiliently Optimistic" class membership across four policy scenarios (No training/No involvement, Training only, Involvement only, Both).
Generate a grouped bar chart with 95% confidence interval error bars for these scenarios.
Save the plot as a high-resolution PNG.
Print a full VIF table for the multinomial regression model, flagging VIF > 5.
Perform sensitivity analysis comparing three model variants: full sample (with "Not sure"), sample excluding "Not sure", and sample with "Not sure" recoded as modal response.
Print a comparison table of key odds ratios across these variants.
Structure the Results section with subsections corresponding to each analytical step.
Reference all saved plots by filename and include a summary table of LCA class sizes and conditional probabilities.
Provide a narrative interpretation of class labels and discuss the strongest QKB enabler effects across strata.
Synthesize all findings into a final report.
